data.title: Bakkt's shares surge by 18% after acquiring Distributed Technologies Research in equity deal.
data.description: Bakkt Holdings has announced its acquisition of stablecoin company Distributed Technologies Research through an equity agreement. The news resulted in a notable 18% increase in the company's shares.

data.title: Binance's CZ reassures crypto holders; Wells Fargo clients holds $383M in Bitcoin ETFs, reported.
data.description: Update: Clarification has been made that the mentioned holdings pertain to client investments in Bitcoin ETFs. Recent filings indicated that Wells Fargo customers have accumulated significant exposure to Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) via ETFs. This news has garnered reactions from the cryptocurrency space, notably from Changpeng Zhao, Binance's founder. The reveal that Wells Fargo clients have $383 million invested in Bitcoin ETFs arrives amidst growing uncertainty in the market. More in-depth coverage can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: SEC Chair questions if US will confiscate Venezuela's alleged $60 billion Bitcoin; Analysts can't confirm.
data.description: A number of experts in blockchain technology stated they could not confirm if the Latin American country possessed $60 billion in the digital currency.

data.title: Fitch Ratings warns of high market risk for Bitcoin-backed securities due to potential value fluctuations, risking losses for lenders and investors.
data.description: Fitch has warned that sudden fluctuations in the price of Bitcoin could rapidly diminish the assets supporting these investments, heightening the possibility of financial setbacks for both borrowers and stakeholders.

data.title: Dr. William R. Harbron recognized as Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence for Coaching and Consulting in The Inner Circle.
data.description: In Dover, New Hampshire, on January 12, 2026, Dr. William R. Harbron was acknowledged as a Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence in Coaching and Consulting in The Inner Circle. Dr. Harbron has made significant contributions to the field and has had a successful career.

data.title: Steven T. Snow recognized as a top lawyer of 2025 by The Inner Circle for his work in personal injury and business litigation.
data.description: On January 12, 2026 in Mashpee, Massachusetts, Steven T. Snow was recognized as a top lawyer for 2025 in The Inner Circle for his notable work in advocating for justice through years of expertise in personal injury and business litigation. Snow is celebrated for his contributions in this field.

data.title: Pamela Rummage Culp recognized as Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence for Real Estate by The Inner Circle.
data.description: On January 12, 2026, in Menlo Park, California, Pamela Rummage Culp was acknowledged as a distinguished Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence in The Inner Circle for her valuable input in Real Estate and Client Relations. Her exceptional contributions were highlighted, showcasing her expertise in the field.

data.title: Michael Evans recognized as Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence for Real Estate by The Inner Circle.
data.description: In Mackay, Idaho on January 12, 2026, Michael Evans was recognized in The Inner Circle as a top-tier Pinnacle Professional Member for his exceptional work in Real Estate. Evans, who is a committed Realtor affiliated with Coldwell Banker Distinctive, was celebrated for his remarkable contributions.

data.title: Western Digital (Nasdaq: WDC) to report Q2 FY 2026 results on January 29, 2026, after market close. Conference call at 1:30 p.m. Pacific/4:30 p.m. Eastern. Webcast at investor.wdc.com.
data.description: A technology company based in San Jose, California, Western Digital Corp. (Nasdaq: WDC) is set to reveal its financial results for the second quarter of fiscal year 2026 on January 29, 2026, after the market closes. Following this, on the same day, they will conduct a conference call at 1:30 p.m. Pacific / 4:30 p.m. Eastern with investors to analyze these results. An opportunity to access a live audio webcast and a replay of the conference call will be provided at investor.wdc.com. More information about Western Digital can be found on their website.

data.title: Article discusses changing approaches to transformation journeys. Popular New Year's Resolution is getting healthier. National Quitter's Day on January 9th trends are noted.
data.description: Prepare yourself with the resources necessary to continue progress on your journey of transformation past National Quitter's Day on January 9th. According to a report from Woodbury, Minnesota on January 12, 2026, the top New Year's Resolution for many is to improve their health through improved nutrition and exercise. After the new year, a significant number of individuals aim to adopt a healthier lifestyle, with many seeking ways to make lasting changes in their habits.

data.title: US Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth visits Rocket Lab headquarters during "Arsenal of Freedom" tour, emphasizing the importance of private space sector in defense strategy. Rocket Lab seen as cornerstone of defense industrial base. RKLB stock rising.
data.description: Last week, Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth visited Rocket Lab Corp. headquarters on a tour called "Arsenal of Freedom," marking a significant change in the Pentagon's approach towards the private space industry. Hegseth, self-proclaimed "Secretary of War," highlighted Rocket Lab (NASDAQ: RKLB) as a crucial element of the country's defense industrial base, asserting that future battles will be determined in space. Approximately 200 Rocket Lab employees were addressed by Hegseth, who discussed the Pentagon's new procurement strategy and positioned Rocket Lab as the cornerstone of the nation's defense industry. Following the visit, RKLB stock has seen an increase. Further details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: USA Compression Partners LP acquires J-W Power Company for $860 million, funded $430 million in cash.
data.description: USA Compression Partners, LP (NYSE: USAC) has confirmed the finalization of its acquisition of J-W Power Company. The total cost of the transaction amounted to around $860 million. To finance the purchase, USAC utilized $430 million in cash from their revolving credit facility, while the remaining portion was covered through the issuance of roughly 18.2 million common units at a predetermined price.

data.title: Thermo Fisher Scientific partners with NVIDIA to advance lab performance using AI technology; collaboration aims to boost automation and accuracy at scale.
data.description: In Waltham, Massachusetts, Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc. (NYSE: TMO) recently revealed a significant partnership with NVIDIA aimed at enhancing AI-driven solutions and expanding laboratory automation on a large scale. By utilizing the NVIDIA Artificial Intelligence (AI) platform alongside Thermo Fisher Scientific's technologies, this collaboration aims to boost the efficiency, precision, and pace of laboratory operations. Through this joint effort, the focus is on advancing the digital infrastructure that supports scientific endeavors.

data.title: Brad Gerstman releases "Best Dressed in Politics" list for 2025 in NYC, featuring top fashion figures.
data.description: In a recent announcement dated January 12, 2026, Brad Gerstman, a government relations attorney located in Manhattan and a key figure at Gerstman PLLC, has unveiled his latest "Best Dressed in Politics" compilation for the year 2025. This yearly tradition, which spotlights the most stylish individuals in the political sphere, has garnered attention as a cheerful and anticipated event among the audience.

data.title: ADM will announce Q4 2025 financial results on Feb. 3, 2026, with a webcast at 7:30 am CT. Press release and presentation will be available. Visit www.adm.com/webcast.
data.description: In Chicago, ADM (NYSE: ADM) disclosed that a management audio webcast is scheduled for Tuesday, February 3, 2026, at 7:30 a.m. Central Time to review financial outcomes for Q4 of 2025 and to offer a company update. Ahead of the call, ADM will release a press statement and accompanying presentation, accessible at ADM - Investor Relations. For the webcast, visit www.adm.com/webcast. Following the event, a replay will be available.
